purpose: Sample registry for stable capability, boundary, responsibility, behavior, and document anchors.
rules: Markdown documents reference stable anchor_id values only.
Markdown documents must not reference JSON paths, array indexes, or schema-specific internal paths.
Deprecated anchors should stay registered and must not be reused for a different meaning.
Untested contracts use test_anchor: null with untested_reason or pending_since instead of scattered TODO markers.

capabilities.statement: Sample capability placeholder for a project-supported business question type.
capabilities.untested_reason: Sample entry only; replace with a project-specific contract and test anchor.

capability_boundaries.statement: Sample boundary placeholder for a currently unsupported capability that may be added later.
capability_boundaries.untested_reason: Sample entry only; replace with a project-specific boundary and test anchor.

responsibility_boundaries.statement: Sample responsibility boundary placeholder for decisions the system should not make on behalf of humans.
responsibility_boundaries.untested_reason: Sample entry only; replace with a project-specific responsibility boundary and test anchor.

agent_behaviors.statement: Sample behavior placeholder requiring the agent to ask for missing critical context instead of guessing.
agent_behaviors.untested_reason: Sample entry only; replace with a project-specific behavior contract and test anchor.

documents.statement: docs/business_user_guide.md is a teaching document derived from capability_contract.json and interact.md.
documents.untested_reason: Alignment principles are documented in TESTING.md; project-specific tests are added by each target project.

documents.statement: interact.md is the source of truth for user-visible behavior and acceptance invariants.
documents.untested_reason: Alignment principles are documented in TESTING.md; project-specific tests are added by each target project.
